name: Acolyte
summary: You devoted your years to service in a temple, learning rites, letters and the shape of the divine.

data.equipment: Calligrapher's supplies, book of prayers, holy symbol, parchment, robe, 8 gp

name: Criminal
summary: You earned your keep in the shadows — picking locks, picking pockets, and knowing when to run.

data.equipment: Two daggers, thieves' tools, crowbar, two pouches, traveler's clothes, 16 gp

name: Sage
summary: You spent years among books and scrolls, chasing the answers behind the world.

data.equipment: Quarterstaff, calligrapher's supplies, book of lore, parchment, robe, 8 gp

name: Soldier
summary: You trained, marched and fought under a banner. Discipline and violence are old friends.

data.equipment: Spear, shortbow with 20 arrows, gaming set, healer's kit, quiver, traveler's clothes, 14 gp
